## Checklist

- [ ] The issue and acceptance criteria are linked.
- [ ] Every commit follows Conventional Commits and uses an English message without Han-script characters.
- [ ] Tests cover the change and relevant regression risk.
- [ ] Documentation, examples, API contracts, and migration notes are updated.
- [ ] No secret, credential, customer data, or production dump is included.
- [ ] Observability, rollout, and rollback are addressed where applicable.
- [ ] The PR is focused and ready for CODEOWNER review.
